title: Erepsia compressa
intro: Erepsia compressa, also known as the "dune orepetal", is a succulent plant species native to southern Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may aid in wound healing and the treatment of various infections. The bioactive constituents of Erepsia compressa include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Erepsia compressa is often used to make herbal infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma.
